title: Promotion gate drift packet
goal: Produce an implementation-ready mismatch report for Ark without editing core promotion code.
deliverable: Delivered in memos/99_structural_drift_evidence_packet.md with grouped findings, exact tests, and exact file references.

title: Parser typed-record migration packet
goal: Map every dict-shaped assumption that blocks a clean typed-record parser contract.
deliverable: Delivered in memos/99_structural_drift_evidence_packet.md as a line-referenced migration checklist grouped by record-access class.

title: Common-layer contract census
goal: Separate stale tests from incomplete refactors and accidental regressions.
deliverable: Delivered in memos/99_structural_drift_evidence_packet.md as a contract census covering current behavior, expected behavior, and recommended direction.
constraints: Classify each failure as stale_test, incomplete_refactor, or accidental_regression

title: Execution queue compression
goal: Compress the evidence into one clean Ark-facing queue without changing core project policy.
deliverable: Completed via the Codex execution plan, Ark handoff packet, and integrated task matrix.
verification: Read Photius evidence outputs when ready
constraints: Do not create new human decision overload
Do not absorb Ark-owned implementation by default

title: Promotion gate repair
goal: Make the live promote path match the documented gate contract and restore dossier evidence completeness.
deliverable: Passing promote-gate tests and a durable memo describing the repair.
constraints: One core lane at a time

title: Parser typed-record repair
goal: Complete the parser's migration to one stable record contract.
deliverable: Passing verse-split tests and stable marker trace serialization.
constraints: Start only after promotion lane is closed or explicitly paused

title: Common-layer compatibility cleanup
goal: Reconcile helper APIs and their tests in one compatibility pass.
deliverable: Passing common-layer tests and a clarified helper contract.
constraints: Run after promotion and parser lanes
